/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libpointcloud_classifier__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libpointcloud_classifier__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/pointcloud_classifier__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/pointcloud_classifier/msg/detail/cluster_result__description.c.o CMakeFiles/pointcloud_classifier__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/pointcloud_classifier/msg/detail/cluster_result__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/pointcloud_classifier__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/pointcloud_classifier/msg/detail/cluster_result__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/pointcloud_classifier__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/pointcloud_classifier/msg/detail/cluster_result_array__description.c.o CMakeFiles/pointcloud_classifier__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/pointcloud_classifier/msg/detail/cluster_result_array__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/pointcloud_classifier__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/pointcloud_classifier/msg/detail/cluster_result_array__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
